components.name: point_in_time_ingestion
components.role: Builds leakage-aware snapshots with dataset versioning and reproducible calendars.

components.name: factor_library
components.role: Computes cross-sectional scores, regime overlays, and signal diagnostics.

components.name: portfolio_constructor
components.role: Forms long-short books with sector controls, turnover smoothing, and cost modeling.

components.name: universe_filter_engine
components.role: Applies tradability, liquidity, and volatility screens while recording retention and attrition diagnostics.

components.name: execution_simulator
components.role: Estimates ADV participation, fill ratios, and implementation shortfall before a sleeve is considered promotable.

components.name: experiment_tracker
components.role: Persists runs, artifacts, labels, workspaces, and replay lineage for auditability.

components.name: validation_suite
components.role: Applies public-facing risk gates for drawdown, turnover, beta, and sector concentration.

components.name: tearsheet_service
components.role: Exports charts, markdown, attribution tables, and downloadable run bundles.

engineering_signals: Point-in-time research contracts and reproducible experiment lineage
Workspace-oriented experiment tracking and replayable tearsheet bundles
Exposure control, attribution, and validation gates baked into every run
Universe filtering and execution simulation visible in artifacts instead of hidden inside a notebook
CI-ready repo surface with scripts, smoke tests, and deploy-friendly app packaging
